Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application with React frontend and Express backend
Container.Description:
DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics
Features: - Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based web dashboard - Express.js REST API - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Configurable DNS servers and timeouts
Web Access: http://[IP]:3000
Data Persistence: - Database stored at /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring
Instructions: 1. Note: Requires pre-built Docker image on Docker Hub 2. Build locally: git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git Then: docker build -t freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest . Then: docker push freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest 3. Or use docker-compose deployment method
